attack_patterns.description: Adversary intercepts and modifies HTTPS traffic between车主APP and ADS云 to inject a falsified maxMobileDistanceLimit value, enabling unauthorized VPD activation beyond 1500mm.
attack_patterns.name: Insecure TLS Downgrade or MITM on HTTPS Distance Parameter Request

attack_patterns.description: Adversary compromises the车主APP binary (e.g., via repackaging) to bypass local distance validation logic, ignoring maxMobileDistanceLimit and enabling VPD regardless of phone-to-vehicle distance.
attack_patterns.name: 车主APP Binary Tampering to Disable Distance Check

attack_patterns.description: Adversary spoofs GPS/WiFi/BLE location data on the手机 to report false proximity (<1500mm) to vehicle, tricking车主APP into enabling VPD despite actual distance violation.
attack_patterns.name: 手机 Location Spoofing to Bypass VPD Distance Gate

attack_patterns.description: Adversary performs reconnaissance on ADS云 endpoint (192.168.1.19) to enumerate API structure, identify authentication weaknesses, or harvest valid session tokens for unauthorized distance parameter manipulation.
attack_patterns.name: ADS云 Endpoint Enumeration and API Fingerprinting

attack_patterns.description: Adversary exploits insecure storage in车主APP to extract cached maxMobileDistanceLimit or session tokens, enabling replay or parameter reuse across devices or sessions.
attack_patterns.name: 车主APP Local Cache Extraction of Distance Limit Parameter

targets.description: Primary enforcement point for VPD distance gate; vulnerable to binary tampering and insecure caching.
Source of trust for maxMobileDistanceLimit; exposed endpoint increases attack surface.
Platform for location sensing and app execution; susceptible to spoofing and runtime manipulation.

simulated_attack_paths.name: MITM Parameter Override Path
path_steps: when attacker controls local network or installs rogue root CA on手机, 车主APP HTTPS request to ADS云 is intercepted and modified to return maxMobileDistanceLimit=9999, lead to VPD button enabled despite actual distance >1500mm.
when modified response reaches车主APP, it accepts falsified maxMobileDistanceLimit and enables VPD UI without validating signature, lead to unauthorized VPD activation.

simulated_attack_paths.name: Location Spoofing Bypass Path
path_steps: when attacker enables mock location provider on手机 and sets fake coordinates near vehicle, 手机 reports distance_to_vehicle=500mm to车主APP, lead to VPD button enabled.
when车主APP consumes spoofed distance without cross-sensor validation (e.g., BLE RSSI, UWB), it skips physical proximity check, lead to VPD activation at arbitrary distance.

observables.description: The Android device hosting车主APP and executing location sensing.
observables.name: 手机

observables.description: The mobile application that requests and enforces maxMobileDistanceLimit before enabling VPD.
observables.name: 车主APP

observables.description: The cloud service endpoint (192.168.1.19) serving signed distance limit parameters.
observables.name: ADS云

observables.description: The numeric parameter controlling VPD activation threshold (e.g., 1500).
observables.name: maxMobileDistanceLimit

course_of_actions.description: Enforce mutual TLS (mTLS) between车主APP and ADS云 to prevent MITM and ensure endpoint authenticity.
course_of_actions.name: Enforce mTLS for ADS云 Distance Parameter API

course_of_actions.description: Implement runtime application self-protection (RASP) in车主APP to detect and block location spoofing APIs (e.g., mock location providers, fake GNSS), and verify sensor fusion consistency.
course_of_actions.name: Deploy RASP-Based Location Integrity Verification in车主APP

course_of_actions.description: Validate and sign maxMobileDistanceLimit responses from ADS云 using embedded public key in车主APP; reject unsigned or tampered payloads.
course_of_actions.name: Cryptographically Sign Distance Limit Responses from ADS云

course_of_actions.description: Store maxMobileDistanceLimit only in secure enclave (Android Keystore) with no plaintext cache; require fresh signed fetch per VPD page load.
course_of_actions.name: Eliminate Plaintext Caching of Distance Limit Parameter

indicator.name: HTTPS request to ADS云 endpoint with non-standard User-Agent and missing client certificate
indicator.pattern: event.category:network and event.type:connection and tls.client.certificate: null and http.user_agent: /.*[Frida|Xposed|BurpSuite|mitmproxy].*/

indicator.name: 手机 reports GPS accuracy >50m while reporting sub-1500mm distance to vehicle
车主APP writes maxMobileDistanceLimit to external storage or shared preferences

security_goals.description: Ensure only authorized users within 1500mm of vehicle can activate VPD.
security_goals.name: VPD Proximity Enforcement
